1 2020-12-08 laser_geometry
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.

2 2020-01-15 kobuki_ftdi
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.

1 2021-07-06 kinova_description
3D model of various Kinova robotic arms. Includes the model and URDF files for working with an arm in RViz or Gazebo.
3D model of various Kinova robotic arms. Includes the model and URDF files for working with an arm in RViz or Gazebo.
 
1 2021-07-06 kinova_driver
The ROS Kinova driver provides a ROS interface for the Kinova Robotics robotic manipulator arms. This stack provides access to the Kinova C++ hardware API through ROS.
The ROS Kinova driver provides a ROS interface for the Kinova Robotics robotic manipulator arms. This stack provides access to the Kinova C++ hardware API through ROS.
 
1 2021-07-06 kinova_gazebo
kinova_gazebo
kinova_gazebo
 
1 2021-07-06 kinova_msgs
This contains the messages, actions and services for interfacing with the Kinova Kinovathrough ROS.
This contains the messages, actions and services for interfacing with the Kinova Kinovathrough ROS.
 
1 kml_util
1 kni
1 2021-02-07 knowledge_representation
APIs for storing and querying information about the world. Provides C++ and Python API's to make getting facts in and out easy (while still exposing a full SQL interface). Supports PostgreSQL and MySQL backends.
APIs for storing and querying information about the world. Provides C++ and Python API's to make getting facts in and out easy (while still exposing a full SQL interface). Supports PostgreSQL and MySQL backends.

2 2020-09-16 kobuki_dock_drive
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
 
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_driver
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
 
1 kobuki_firmware
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_ftdi
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.

Provides nodes to assemble point clouds from either LaserScan or PointCloud messages

1 2021-05-15 laser_cb_detector
Extracts checkerboard corners from a dense laser snapshot. This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.
Extracts checkerboard corners from a dense laser snapshot. This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.

1 2020-05-13 laser_filtering
ROS Libraries for filtering specific kinds of laser scans

1 2021-06-29 laser_filters
Assorted filters designed to operate on 2D planar laser scanners, which use the sensor_msgs/LaserScan type.

1 2021-02-05 laser_geometry
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.

1 2021-02-15 laser_ortho_projector
The laser_ortho_projector package calculates orthogonal projections of LaserScan messages.
The laser_ortho_projector package calculates orthogonal projections of LaserScan messages.

Meta-package of libraries for processing laser data, including converting laser data into 3D representations.

laser_proc

1 2021-05-10 laser_scan_densifier
The laser_scan_densifier takes in a LaserScan message and densifies it. Node is inspired by laser_scan_sparsifier (http://wiki.ros.org/laser_scan_sparsifier).
The laser_scan_densifier takes in a LaserScan message and densifies it. Node is inspired by laser_scan_sparsifier (http://wiki.ros.org/laser_scan_sparsifier).
 
1 2021-02-15 laser_scan_matcher

1 2021-02-15 laser_scan_sparsifier
The laser_scan_sparsifier takes in a LaserScan message and sparsifies it.
The laser_scan_sparsifier takes in a LaserScan message and sparsifies it.
 
1 2021-02-15 laser_scan_splitter
The laser_scan_splitter takes in a LaserScan message and splits it into a number of other LaserScan messages. Each of the resulting laser scans can be assigned an arbitrary coordinate frame, and is published on a separate topic.
The laser_scan_splitter takes in a LaserScan message and splits it into a number of other LaserScan messages. Each of the resulting laser scans can be assigned an arbitrary coordinate frame, and is published on a separate topic.
 
3 2021-03-02 laser_tilt_controller_filter
laser_tilt_controller_filter
laser_tilt_controller_filter
 
1 2021-04-27 laserscan_kinect
Package laserscan_kinect converts depth image from the depth sensor to a 2D laser scanner format. The conversion algorithm allows to remove a ground from the depth image and compensate the sensor mount tilt angle relative to the ground.
Package laserscan_kinect converts depth image from the depth sensor to a 2D laser scanner format. The conversion algorithm allows to remove a ground from the depth image and compensate the sensor mount tilt angle relative to the ground.

1 2021-06-08 kinova_description
3D model of various Kinova robotic arms. Includes the model and URDF files for working with an arm in RViz or Gazebo.
3D model of various Kinova robotic arms. Includes the model and URDF files for working with an arm in RViz or Gazebo.
 
1 2021-06-08 kinova_driver
The ROS Kinova driver provides a ROS interface for the Kinova Robotics robotic manipulator arms. This stack provides access to the Kinova C++ hardware API through ROS.
The ROS Kinova driver provides a ROS interface for the Kinova Robotics robotic manipulator arms. This stack provides access to the Kinova C++ hardware API through ROS.

1 2021-02-07 knowledge_representation
APIs for storing and querying information about the world. Provides C++ and Python API's to make getting facts in and out easy (while still exposing a full SQL interface). Supports PostgreSQL and MySQL backends.
APIs for storing and querying information about the world. Provides C++ and Python API's to make getting facts in and out easy (while still exposing a full SQL interface). Supports PostgreSQL and MySQL backends.

1 2020-10-12 kobuki
Software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
Software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
 
2 2020-10-12 kobuki_auto_docking
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
 
2 2020-10-12 kobuki_bumper2pc
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
 
1 2020-10-12 kobuki_capabilities
Kobuki's capabilities
Kobuki's capabilities
 
2 2020-10-12 kobuki_controller_tutorial
Code for the Kobuki controller tutorial.
Code for the Kobuki controller tutorial.
 
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_core
Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
 
1 2021-03-21 kobuki_dashboard
The Kobuki dashboard is a RQT-based plug-in for visualising data from Kobuki and giving easy access to basic functionalities.
The Kobuki dashboard is a RQT-based plug-in for visualising data from Kobuki and giving easy access to basic functionalities.
 
2 2020-10-12 kobuki_description
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
 
1 2021-03-21 kobuki_desktop
Visualisation and simulation tools for Kobuki
Visualisation and simulation tools for Kobuki
 
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_dock_drive
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
 
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_driver
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
 
1 kobuki_firmware
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_ftdi
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.

Kobuki-specific ROS plugins for Gazebo

2 2020-10-12 kobuki_safety_controller
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!

1 2021-06-11 laser_filters
Assorted filters designed to operate on 2D planar laser scanners, which use the sensor_msgs/LaserScan type.

1 2021-07-15 laser_filters_jsk_patch

1 2021-02-05 laser_geometry
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
 
2 2021-06-12 laser_joint_processor
Computes joint angles associated with a specific set of detected checkerboard corners. This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.
Computes joint angles associated with a specific set of detected checkerboard corners. This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.
 
2 2021-06-12 laser_joint_projector
Projects laser readings into a point cloud, based on a set of recorded joint angles This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.
Projects laser readings into a point cloud, based on a set of recorded joint angles This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.

1 2021-05-12 laser_geometry
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.

2 laser_joint_projector

1 2018-06-28 laser_geometry
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.

1 kobuki
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_auto_docking
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
 
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_bumper2pc
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
 
1 kobuki_capabilities
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_controller_tutorial
Code for the Kobuki controller tutorial.
Code for the Kobuki controller tutorial.
 
2 2020-01-14 kobuki_core
Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
 
1 kobuki_dashboard
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_description
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
 
1 kobuki_desktop
2 2020-01-14 kobuki_dock_drive
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
 
2 2020-01-14 kobuki_driver
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
 
1 2020-05-31 kobuki_firmware
Firmware blobs for kobuki.
Firmware blobs for kobuki.
 
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_ftdi
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
 
1 kobuki_gazebo
1 kobuki_gazebo_plugins
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_keyop
Keyboard teleoperation for Kobuki: relays commands from a keyboard to Kobuki.
Keyboard teleoperation for Kobuki: relays commands from a keyboard to Kobuki.
 
1 kobuki_led_controller
1 kobuki_msgs
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_node
ROS nodelet for Kobuki: ROS wrapper for the Kobuki driver.
ROS nodelet for Kobuki: ROS wrapper for the Kobuki driver.
 
1 kobuki_qtestsuite
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_random_walker
Random walker app for Kobuki
Random walker app for Kobuki
 
1 kobuki_rapps
1 2020-01-15 kobuki_ros
ROS2 runtime software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
ROS2 runtime software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
 
1 2020-01-14 kobuki_ros_interfaces
 
1 kobuki_rviz_launchers
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_safety_controller
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
 
1 kobuki_soft
1 kobuki_softapps
1 kobuki_softnode
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_testsuite
Kobuki test suite: this package provides tools to thoroughly test Kobuki's hardware.
Kobuki test suite: this package provides tools to thoroughly test Kobuki's hardware.

Examples for working with Lanelet2
Examples for working with Lanelet2
 
1 2021-06-10 lanelet2_io
Parser/Writer module for lanelet2
Parser/Writer module for lanelet2
 
1 2021-06-10 lanelet2_maps
Example maps in the lanelet2-format
Example maps in the lanelet2-format
 
1 2021-06-10 lanelet2_matching
Library to match objects to lanelets
Library to match objects to lanelets
 
1 2021-06-10 lanelet2_projection
Lanelet2 projection library for lat/lon to local x/y conversion
Lanelet2 projection library for lat/lon to local x/y conversion
 
1 2021-06-10 lanelet2_python
Python bindings for lanelet2
Python bindings for lanelet2
 
1 2021-06-10 lanelet2_routing
Routing module for lanelet2
Routing module for lanelet2
 
1 2021-06-10 lanelet2_traffic_rules
Package for interpreting traffic rules in a lanelet map
Package for interpreting traffic rules in a lanelet map
 
1 2021-06-10 lanelet2_validation
Package for sanitizing lanelet maps
Package for sanitizing lanelet maps

1 2020-02-06 laser_geometry
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.

This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.

1 2018-06-03 laser_scan_splitter
The laser_scan_splitter takes in a LaserScan message and splits it into a number of other LaserScan messages. Each of the resulting laser scans can be assigned an arbitrary coordinate frame, and is published on a separate topic.
The laser_scan_splitter takes in a LaserScan message and splits it into a number of other LaserScan messages. Each of the resulting laser scans can be assigned an arbitrary coordinate frame, and is published on a separate topic.

1 2016-11-09 kobuki
Software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.

2 2016-11-09 kobuki_auto_docking
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
 
2 2016-11-09 kobuki_bumper2pc
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
 
1 2016-11-09 kobuki_capabilities

2 2016-11-09 kobuki_controller_tutorial
Code for the Kobuki controller tutorial.

2 2016-11-09 kobuki_core
Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.

1 2015-03-02 kobuki_dashboard
The Kobuki dashboard is a RQT-based plug-in for visualising data from Kobuki and giving easy access to basic functionalities.
The Kobuki dashboard is a RQT-based plug-in for visualising data from Kobuki and giving easy access to basic functionalities.
 
2 2016-11-09 kobuki_description
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
 
1 2015-03-02 kobuki_desktop
Visualisation and simulation tools for Kobuki
Visualisation and simulation tools for Kobuki
 
2 2016-11-09 kobuki_dock_drive
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
 
2 2016-11-09 kobuki_driver
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
 
1 kobuki_firmware
2 2016-11-09 kobuki_ftdi
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.

2 2016-11-09 kobuki_safety_controller
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!

2 2019-04-03 laser_joint_processor
Computes joint angles associated with a specific set of detected checkerboard corners. This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.

2 2019-04-03 laser_joint_projector
Projects laser readings into a point cloud, based on a set of recorded joint angles This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.

1 2021-05-23 laser_odometry_core
Core library for the laser_odometry package. It contains the base class from which laser scan matcher wrappers should inherit from.

1 2021-05-23 laser_odometry_node
Node package of the laser_odometry project. It contains the ROS node that instantiate the laser scan matcher plugin. It also defines and centralizes some of the common steps to aggregate a consecutive laser scan displacement estimates to a proper odometry.
Node package of the laser_odometry project. It contains the ROS node that instantiate the laser scan matcher plugin. It also defines and centralizes some of the common steps to aggregate a consecutive laser scan displacement estimates to a proper odometry.

1 2020-05-03 laserscan_kinect
Package laserscan_kinect converts depth image from Microsoft Kinect sensor to 2D laser scanner format. Conversion algorithm allows to remove ground from depth image and compensate sensor mount tilt angle relative to the ground.
Package laserscan_kinect converts depth image from Microsoft Kinect sensor to 2D laser scanner format. Conversion algorithm allows to remove ground from depth image and compensate sensor mount tilt angle relative to the ground.

1 2014-08-20 kobuki
Software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.

2 2014-08-20 kobuki_auto_docking
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
 
2 2014-08-20 kobuki_bumper2pc
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
 
1 kobuki_capabilities
2 2014-08-20 kobuki_controller_tutorial
Code for the Kobuki controller tutorial.
Code for the Kobuki controller tutorial.
 
2 2014-05-29 kobuki_core
Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
 
1 2014-08-05 kobuki_dashboard
The Kobuki dashboard is a RQT-based plug-in for visualising data from Kobuki and giving easy access to basic functionalities.
The Kobuki dashboard is a RQT-based plug-in for visualising data from Kobuki and giving easy access to basic functionalities.
 
2 2014-08-20 kobuki_description
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
 
1 2014-08-05 kobuki_desktop
Visualisation and simulation tools for Kobuki
Visualisation and simulation tools for Kobuki
 
2 2014-05-29 kobuki_dock_drive
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
 
2 2014-05-29 kobuki_driver
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
 
1 kobuki_firmware
2 2014-05-29 kobuki_ftdi
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.

Kobuki simulation for Gazebo
Kobuki simulation for Gazebo
 
1 2014-08-05 kobuki_gazebo_plugins
Kobuki-specific ROS plugins for Gazebo
Kobuki-specific ROS plugins for Gazebo
 
2 2014-08-20 kobuki_keyop
Keyboard teleoperation for Kobuki: relays commands from a keyboard to Kobuki.
Keyboard teleoperation for Kobuki: relays commands from a keyboard to Kobuki.

2 2014-08-20 kobuki_safety_controller
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!

1 2014-05-09 kurt_2dnav
This application allows the Kurt robot to navigate autonomously with a pre-specified static map. This package is modeled after pr2_2dnav.
This application allows the Kurt robot to navigate autonomously with a pre-specified static map. This package is modeled after pr2_2dnav.
 
1 2014-05-09 kurt_2dnav_slam
This application allows the Kurt to navigate autonomously while also building a map of its environment as it drives along. It is modeled after pr2_2dnav_slam.
This application allows the Kurt to navigate autonomously while also building a map of its environment as it drives along. It is modeled after pr2_2dnav_slam.

Extracts checkerboard corners from a dense laser snapshot. This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.

1 2016-07-24 laser_filtering
ROS Libraries for filtering specific kinds of laser scans

1 2014-03-04 laser_filters
Assorted filters designed to operate on 2D planar laser scanners, which use the sensor_msgs/LaserScan type.
Assorted filters designed to operate on 2D planar laser scanners, which use the sensor_msgs/LaserScan type.
 
1 2021-07-15 laser_filters_jsk_patch
laser_filters_jsk_patch
laser_filters_jsk_patch
 
1 2014-06-08 laser_geometry
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
 
2 2015-02-06 laser_joint_processor
Computes joint angles associated with a specific set of detected checkerboard corners. This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.
Computes joint angles associated with a specific set of detected checkerboard corners. This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.
 
2 2015-02-06 laser_joint_projector
Projects laser readings into a point cloud, based on a set of recorded joint angles This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.
Projects laser readings into a point cloud, based on a set of recorded joint angles This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.

The laser_ortho_projector package calculates orthogonal projections of LaserScan messages.

Meta-package of libraries for processing laser data, including converting laser data into 3D representations.

The laser_scan_sparsifier takes in a LaserScan message and sparsifies it.

1 2015-10-14 laser_scan_splitter
The laser_scan_splitter takes in a LaserScan message and splits it into a number of other LaserScan messages. Each of the resulting laser scans can be assigned an arbitrary coordinate frame, and is published on a separate topic.
The laser_scan_splitter takes in a LaserScan message and splits it into a number of other LaserScan messages. Each of the resulting laser scans can be assigned an arbitrary coordinate frame, and is published on a separate topic.

Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Extracts checkerboard corners from a dense laser snapshot. This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.

1 2016-07-24 laser_filtering
ROS Libraries for filtering specific kinds of laser scans

1 2021-06-11 laser_filters
Assorted filters designed to operate on 2D planar laser scanners, which use the sensor_msgs/LaserScan type.
Assorted filters designed to operate on 2D planar laser scanners, which use the sensor_msgs/LaserScan type.
 
1 2021-07-15 laser_filters_jsk_patch
laser_filters_jsk_patch
laser_filters_jsk_patch
 
1 2021-02-05 laser_geometry
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
 
2 2021-06-11 laser_joint_processor
Computes joint angles associated with a specific set of detected checkerboard corners. This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.
Computes joint angles associated with a specific set of detected checkerboard corners. This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.
 
2 2021-06-11 laser_joint_projector
Projects laser readings into a point cloud, based on a set of recorded joint angles This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.
Projects laser readings into a point cloud, based on a set of recorded joint angles This package is experimental and unstable. Expect its APIs to change.

The laser_ortho_projector package calculates orthogonal projections of LaserScan messages.

Meta-package of libraries for processing laser data, including converting laser data into 3D representations.

laser_proc

1 2021-05-10 laser_scan_densifier
The laser_scan_densifier takes in a LaserScan message and densifies it. Node is inspired by laser_scan_sparsifier (http://wiki.ros.org/laser_scan_sparsifier).
The laser_scan_densifier takes in a LaserScan message and densifies it. Node is inspired by laser_scan_sparsifier (http://wiki.ros.org/laser_scan_sparsifier).

1 2018-06-03 laser_scan_sparsifier
The laser_scan_sparsifier takes in a LaserScan message and sparsifies it.
The laser_scan_sparsifier takes in a LaserScan message and sparsifies it.
 
1 2018-06-03 laser_scan_splitter
The laser_scan_splitter takes in a LaserScan message and splits it into a number of other LaserScan messages. Each of the resulting laser scans can be assigned an arbitrary coordinate frame, and is published on a separate topic.
The laser_scan_splitter takes in a LaserScan message and splits it into a number of other LaserScan messages. Each of the resulting laser scans can be assigned an arbitrary coordinate frame, and is published on a separate topic.
 
3 2019-11-15 laser_tilt_controller_filter
laser_tilt_controller_filter
laser_tilt_controller_filter
 
1 2021-04-27 laserscan_kinect
Package laserscan_kinect converts depth image from the depth sensor to a 2D laser scanner format. The conversion algorithm allows to remove a ground from the depth image and compensate the sensor mount tilt angle relative to the ground.
Package laserscan_kinect converts depth image from the depth sensor to a 2D laser scanner format. The conversion algorithm allows to remove a ground from the depth image and compensate the sensor mount tilt angle relative to the ground.
